groupings.title: Avatar creation & identity
groupings.description: Invent or clone a presenter and vary its look — hero stills, camera angles, wardrobe/location variants, and clean reference frames.

groupings.title: Talking-head & reels
groupings.description: Turn a script + an avatar into finished vertical reels — lip-synced talking-head scenes, style transfer, story reels, karaoke captions, and ambient sound design.

groupings.title: B-roll
groupings.description: Generate or find complementary B-roll — hyper-real clips, avatar action shots, real YouTube footage, website/terminal captures.

groupings.title: Voice & audio
groupings.description: Clone voices, isolate clean samples, and generate music and sound effects for reels.

groupings.title: Video editing & analysis
groupings.description: Compose reels, analyze scene structure, replace backgrounds, and transcribe video.

groupings.title: Discovery & downloaders
groupings.description: Find top-performing public reels by topic or brand, and batch-download videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram and Facebook.

groupings.title: Strategy & scripting
groupings.description: Plan a content/channel strategy, write viral short-form scripts, plan the cuts/montage (Rule of Six), and generate company-aware onboarding reel-script series ready to feed the reel pipeline.

groupings.title: Generation engines (shared)
groupings.description: Shared model backends the pipeline skills call under the hood — image generation (GPT Image 2, Gemini asset-generator), audio-synced video (Seedance 2.0 via Higgsfield MCP), multi-character audio (Gemini TTS + SFX + score), and instrumental background music.
